name: Alert
description: +5 to initiative. You can't be surprised while conscious, and hidden attackers don't gain advantage on you.

name: Actor
description: +1 CHA. Advantage on Deception/Performance when impersonating; mimic speech or sounds you've heard.

name: Athlete
description: +1 STR or DEX. Stand from prone using 5 ft of movement; climb at full speed; running jump after only 5 ft.

name: Charger
description: After a Dash, use a bonus action to make one melee attack with +5 damage, or shove a creature 10 ft.

name: Crossbow Expert
description: Ignore loading on crossbows; no disadvantage firing in melee; bonus-action hand-crossbow shot after attacking.

name: Defensive Duelist
description: With a finesse weapon, use a reaction to add your proficiency bonus to AC against one melee attack.

name: Dual Wielder
description: +1 AC while wielding two melee weapons; two-weapon fight with non-light weapons; draw or stow two at once.

name: Durable
description: +1 CON. When you spend a Hit Die to heal, the minimum you regain is twice your CON modifier.

name: Elemental Adept
description: Your spells ignore resistance to a chosen damage type, and treat 1s on damage dice as 2s.

name: Grappler
description: Advantage on attacks against a creature you're grappling; you can attempt to pin a grappled creature.

name: Great Weapon Master
description: Bonus attack on a crit or kill; before a heavy-weapon attack, take -5 to hit for +10 damage.

name: Healer
description: Use a healer's kit to restore 1d6 + 4 + Hit Dice HP to a creature; stabilizing also restores 1 HP.

name: Heavy Armor Master
description: +1 STR. Reduce nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage by 3 while in heavy armor.

name: Inspiring Leader
description: Spend 10 minutes to grant up to six allies temporary HP equal to your level + CHA modifier.

name: Keen Mind
description: +1 INT. Always know which way is north and hours until sunrise/sunset; recall anything seen or heard in the past month.

name: Lucky
description: Gain 3 luck points; spend one to roll an extra d20 on an attack, check, or save (or an attack against you).

name: Mage Slayer
description: Reaction attack when a creature within 5 ft casts; advantage on saves vs their spells; disadvantage on their concentration.

name: Magic Initiate
description: Learn two cantrips and one 1st-level spell from a chosen class; cast the spell once per long rest.

name: Martial Adept
description: Learn two combat maneuvers and gain one superiority die (d6) to fuel them.

name: Medium Armor Master
description: Medium armor no longer imposes Stealth disadvantage; add up to +3 DEX to AC if your DEX is 16+.

name: Mobile
description: +10 ft speed; Dash ignores difficult terrain; no opportunity attacks from a creature you made a melee attack against.

name: Mounted Combatant
description: Advantage vs unmounted creatures smaller than your mount; redirect attacks to yourself; mount dodges area effects.

name: Observant
description: +1 INT or WIS. Read lips; +5 to passive Perception and passive Investigation.

name: Polearm Master
description: Bonus-action butt-end strike (1d4); opportunity attack when a creature enters your reach with a glaive, halberd, pike, quarterstaff, or spear.

name: Resilient
description: +1 to one ability score and gain proficiency in that ability's saving throws.

name: Ritual Caster
description: Cast ritual spells from a chosen class's spell list using a ritual book.

name: Savage Attacker
description: Once per turn, reroll the damage of a melee weapon attack and use either total.

name: Sentinel
description: Opportunity hits reduce a target's speed to 0; attack creatures even if they Disengage; reaction strike when a foe attacks an ally near you.

name: Sharpshooter
description: No disadvantage at long range; ignore half and three-quarters cover; take -5 to hit for +10 damage with ranged weapons.

name: Shield Master
description: Bonus-action shove with your shield; add shield AC to DEX saves vs targeted effects; take no damage on a successful one.

name: Skilled
description: Gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools.

name: Skulker
description: Hide when lightly obscured; a missed ranged attack doesn't reveal you; no Perception disadvantage in dim light.

name: Spell Sniper
description: Double the range of your attack-roll spells; ignore cover; learn one attack cantrip.

name: Tavern Brawler
description: +1 STR or CON. Proficient with improvised weapons; unarmed strikes deal 1d4; bonus-action grapple after a hit.

name: Tough
description: Your maximum HP increases by twice your level (and by 2 each level after).

name: War Caster
description: Advantage on concentration saves; cast with hands full; cast a spell as an opportunity attack instead of a weapon strike.

name: Artificer Initiate
description: Learn one artificer cantrip and one 1st-level artificer spell (cast once per long rest free, or with slots); proficiency with one artisan's tools.

name: Chef
description: +1 CON or WIS. On a rest, cook food that heals extra HP; make treats that grant temporary HP.

name: Crusher
description: +1 STR or CON. Once per turn, move a creature 5 ft when you deal bludgeoning damage; a crit gives attackers advantage against it.

name: Eldritch Adept
description: Learn one Eldritch Invocation you qualify for; you can swap it when you gain a level.

name: Fey Touched
description: +1 INT, WIS, or CHA. Learn misty step plus a 1st-level divination or enchantment spell; cast each once per long rest free (or with slots).

name: Fighting Initiate
description: Learn one Fighting Style from the fighter list.

name: Gunner
description: +1 DEX. Proficiency with firearms, ignore their loading property, and no disadvantage firing in melee.

name: Metamagic Adept
description: Learn two Metamagic options and gain 2 sorcery points to fuel them.

name: Piercer
description: +1 STR or DEX. Once per turn reroll a piercing damage die; on a crit, add one extra piercing damage die.

name: Poisoner
description: Your poison ignores resistance; coat a weapon to add poison damage and the poisoned condition (your DC); brew poison quickly.

name: Shadow Touched
description: +1 INT, WIS, or CHA. Learn invisibility plus a 1st-level illusion or necromancy spell; cast each once per long rest free (or with slots).

name: Skill Expert
description: +1 to one ability. Gain one skill proficiency and turn one proficiency you have into expertise.

name: Slasher
description: +1 STR or DEX. Once per turn reduce a creature's speed by 10 ft when you deal slashing damage; a crit gives it disadvantage on attacks.

name: Telekinetic
description: +1 INT, WIS, or CHA. Learn an improved mage hand; as a bonus action, shove a creature 5 ft (Strength save against your DC).

name: Telepathic
description: +1 INT, WIS, or CHA. Speak telepathically to creatures within 60 ft; cast detect thoughts once per long rest free (or with slots).
